requirement_topic.en: OTAU Radio Type Approval — Kazakhstan Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: OTAU无线电型号核准——哈萨克斯坦电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: OTAU無線電型號核准——哈薩克斯坦電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Kazakhstan market must obtain type approval from OTAU (the telecom regulatory arm of the Ministry of Digital Development, Innovation and Aerospace Industry of Kazakhstan, formerly operating as RCC / KICS). OTAU type approval is a Kazakhstan-specific requirement separate from and additional to the EAEU-wide EAC conformity marking. Applicants must submit technical documentation, test reports from accredited laboratories (including KazInMetr — the Kazakh Institute of Metrology), and a conformity declaration. Approved devices receive a registration number issued by OTAU. Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz), Bluetooth, Zigbee, Z-Wave, cellular, and other radio-frequency devices are all within scope. The approval must be in place before the product is imported and sold in Kazakhstan.
summary.zh: 所有投放哈萨克斯坦市场的无线电及电信终端设备，均须取得OTAU（哈萨克斯坦数字发展、创新与航天工业部电信监管部门，前身为RCC / KICS）的型号核准。OTAU型号核准是哈萨克斯坦特有要求，与全EAEU范围内的EAC合格标志相互独立且须叠加满足。申请人须提交技术文件、经认可实验室（包括KazInMetr——哈萨克斯坦计量研究院）出具的测试报告及合格声明。获批设备将获得OTAU颁发的注册号码。Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、蓝牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窝及其他射频设备均在适用范围内。产品须在进口并于哈萨克斯坦销售前完成核准。
summary.zht: 所有投放哈薩克斯坦市場的無線電及電信終端設備，均須取得OTAU（哈薩克斯坦數字發展、創新與航天工業部電信監管部門，前身為RCC / KICS）的型號核准。OTAU型號核准是哈薩克斯坦特有要求，與全EAEU範圍內的EAC合格標誌相互獨立且須疊加滿足。申請人須提交技術文件、經認可實驗室（包括KazInMetr——哈薩克斯坦計量研究院）出具的測試報告及合格聲明。獲批設備將獲得OTAU頒發的註冊號碼。Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、藍牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave、蜂窩及其他射頻設備均在適用範圍內。產品須在進口並於哈薩克斯坦銷售前完成核准。

standards_or_laws: Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 567-II 'On Communications' (as amended) — establishes mandatory type approval for telecom terminal and radio equipment
Rules on Type Approval of Telecommunications Equipment — approved by the Ministry of Digital Development, Innovation and Aerospace Industry of the Republic of Kazakhstan
OTAU (formerly RCC / KICS) — Radiofrequency Spectrum Management Committee under the Ministry of Digital Development

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) radio type approval for radio transmission modules and equipment, administered under MIIT. Devices using Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and other radio frequencies must obtain an SRRC approval number before sale in China. Terminal equipment (routers, modems, cellular devices) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese SRRC approval and NAL are not recognised by OTAU and do not substitute for Kazakhstan type approval. Test data generated to Chinese standards (GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi, YD/T series for cellular) may in some cases be referenced in OTAU submissions but full re-evaluation by a KazInMetr-accredited laboratory is typically required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，工业和信息化部下属）的无线电型号核准，适用于无线电发射模块及设备。使用Wi-Fi、蓝牙及其他射频的设备须在中国销售前取得SRRC核准号。终端设备（路由器、调制解调器、蜂窝设备）还须额外取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。中国SRRC核准和NAL不被OTAU承认，不可替代哈萨克斯坦型号核准。依据中国标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11，蜂窝适用YD/T系列）产生的测试数据在某些情况下可在OTAU申请中被参考，但通常仍需由KazInMetr认可实验室重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，工業和信息化部下屬）的無線電型號核准，適用於無線電發射模組及設備。使用Wi-Fi、藍牙及其他射頻的設備須在中國銷售前取得SRRC核准號。終端設備（路由器、調製解調器、蜂窩設備）還須額外取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可證（NAL）。中國SRRC核准和NAL不被OTAU承認，不可替代哈薩克斯坦型號核准。依據中國標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11，蜂窩適用YD/T系列）產生的測試數據在某些情況下可在OTAU申請中被參考，但通常仍需由KazInMetr認可實驗室重新評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi, WLAN)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by OTAU and cannot be used as substitutes for Kazakhstan type approval. A separate OTAU type approval application must be filed in Kazakhstan, supported by test reports from a KazInMetr-accredited laboratory. The OTAU process evaluates spectrum use, radio parameters, and conformity with Kazakhstan national and EAEU technical requirements. Products sold in Kazakhstan without valid OTAU type approval are subject to market withdrawal, customs seizure, and administrative penalties. Timeline for OTAU type approval varies but is typically 2–4 months depending on product complexity and submission completeness.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准和工业和信息化部NAL不被OTAU承认，不可用于替代哈萨克斯坦型号核准。须在哈萨克斯坦单独提交OTAU型号核准申请，并附上KazInMetr认可实验室出具的测试报告。OTAU程序评估频谱使用、无线电参数及与哈萨克斯坦国家和EAEU技术要求的符合性。未取得有效OTAU型号核准而在哈萨克斯坦销售的产品，将面临市场下架、海关扣押及行政处罚。OTAU型号核准所需时间视产品复杂程度及申请材料完整性而定，通常为2至4个月。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准和工業和信息化部NAL不被OTAU承認，不可用於替代哈薩克斯坦型號核准。須在哈薩克斯坦單獨提交OTAU型號核准申請，並附上KazInMetr認可實驗室出具的測試報告。OTAU程序評估頻譜使用、無線電參數及與哈薩克斯坦國家和EAEU技術要求的符合性。未取得有效OTAU型號核准而在哈薩克斯坦銷售的產品，將面臨市場下架、海關扣押及行政處罰。OTAU型號核准所需時間視產品複雜程度及申請材料完整性而定，通常為2至4個月。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — OTAU type approval required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import and sale in Kazakhstan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (and MIIT NAL for terminal equipment) required before sale in China

source.publisher: OTAU — Ministry of Digital Development, Innovation and Aerospace Industry of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OTAU type approval is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio devices sold in Kazakhstan. Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute. A dedicated OTAU application with KazInMetr-accredited test reports is required. This approval is in addition to (not instead of) the EAEU-wide EAC conformity marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OTAU型号核准对所有在哈萨克斯坦销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC核准不可替代。须提交附有KazInMetr认可测试报告的专项OTAU申请。此核准与EAEU范围内的EAC合格标志并存，而非替代关系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OTAU型號核准對所有在哈薩克斯坦銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC核准不可替代。須提交附有KazInMetr認可測試報告的專項OTAU申請。此核准與EAEU範圍內的EAC合格標誌並存，而非替代關係。
